title: madebypack
description: A Minecraft modpack that combines good performance and quality of gameplay!
body:
# **DISCONTINUED**

![madebypack title logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d3fc67cbe0dafd49d343e180439c02d500bac18.png)

**A Minecraft modpack that combines good performance and quality of gameplay!**

```

```

### Performance

madebypack uses various optimization mods that can boost your FPS up to **5X TIMES MORE**!


```

```

### Quality

madebypack makes the game look prettier via mods and resource packs!


```

```

### Fabric

madebypack uses the Fabric mod loader, which is fast, lightweight, with support of many mods!
